objective: Reduce public Work detail with videos from two DB commands to one by storing a write-time public video snapshot on Work.
changed: Changed public Work detail projection to read videos from PublicVideosJson.
Refreshed public video snapshot in add, confirm, HLS create, delete, and reorder mutation handlers.
Updated seed maintenance and behavior tests.
not_changed: No load target manipulation or pageSize reduction.
Canonical WorkVideos table remains source of truth for admin and mutations.
No Blog detail or body payload split change in this slice.
No Npgsql pool or nginx timing instrumentation change in this slice.

expected_backend_test_impact.work_read_with_videos: DB command count reduced from 2 to 1; should lower app elapsed and DB pressure for this target.
expected_backend_test_impact.mixed_public_api: Overall improvement depends on Work read share and whether video detail was a bottleneck.
expected_backend_test_impact.not_expected: No direct improvement for Study read/list, Work list, large body serialization, or nginx timing availability.

validations.name: Work video endpoint integration tests plus public null-field contract
dotnet test backend/WoongBlog.sln --no-restore
validations.count: Contract 1 skipped, Component 124, Unit 56, Architecture 35, Integration 228

risks: Docker compose rebuild was blocked by external DNS failures for NuGet and Google Fonts, so load smoke used a mounted local publish instead of a rebuilt compose image.
Load smoke is not a prod-like 2CPU/8GB benchmark.
Future video mutation paths must keep PublicVideosJson refreshed.
Public read still deserializes a small JSON snapshot per request.
final_recommendation: Proceed to PR/CI, then target large public detail body payload and JSON serialization allocation next.
